personality_one_liner: A high-performance, command-center interface optimizing for rapid scanning, metric hierarchy, and tactical decision-making with a premium crypto-native feel.

spacing.rule: Use dense but organized spacing. Metrics must dominate the screen. Use dividers and tonal separation instead of heavy shadows.

do's: Use glass on bottom tab bar to allow scrolling charts to bleed behind.
Use glass on pinned timeframe segmented controls/filters.
Use glass on AI trade alert modals or bottom sheets.
dont's: Do not use glass on dense data rows, form fields, or standard trading metrics.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Primary trading dashboard with live charts, timeframe selection, and instantaneous AI setup analysis.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for the chart widget and pair header.
states.empty: Illustration of an AI scanning a dark chart with prompt 'Select a pair to analyze setups.'

screens.layout: Sticky top header with Pair/Exchange selector. Pinned horizontal scroll for Timeframes (5m, 15m, 1H, etc.) using glassmorphism. Scrollable body: Live chart area taking up upper half. Below chart: Upload Screenshot section. Bottom: Large pinned 'Analyze' CTA button in thumb-zone. Upon analysis, an AI Report Card appears with A+/A/B/C badge, Entry/SL/TP metrics in condensed display font, and an expandable Checklist.

screens.name: Watchlist
screens.purpose: Monitor active crypto pairs and their live AI-generated trade scores.

states.empty: Empty state graphic with 'No pairs added. Tap + to track.'
states.error: Failed to fetch live prices error text.

screens.layout: List view. Each row contains the Pair symbol, live price, 24h change, and a colored AI Score pill (e.g., green 'A+', yellow 'WAIT'). Use tonal separation and dividers between rows.

screens.name: Alerts
screens.purpose: Create and manage smart conditions for trade alerts.

states.empty: Bell icon with 'No active alerts. Set your criteria.'
states.error: Error message if push notifications are disabled.

screens.layout: Toggle list for active alerts. Floating Action Button (FAB) to add a new alert. Creation flow uses a bottom sheet with form inputs for Pair, Metric (Confidence, Price), and Trigger Condition.

screens.name: Journal
screens.purpose: Log, grade, and review past trades with screenshot attachments.

states.empty: Wallet/Log icon with 'Your trading journal is empty. Log your first A+ trade.'

screens.layout: Feed of past trades. Each card shows Pair, Trade Date, PnL metric, and AI Grade. Cards use surfaceSecondary with subtle borders. Includes a thumbnail slot for chart screenshots.

screens.name: Tools
screens.purpose: Position size calculator and beginner-friendly education resources.
screens.layout: Segmented control at the top: 'Calculator' | 'Education'. Calculator: Form with Account Balance, Risk %, Stop Loss %, with a sticky 'Calculate Position' CTA. Education: Accordion list of beginner explanations for Entry, RR, SL, TP.

home_chart_bg.alt: Dark crypto trading chart showing market fluctuations

neon_abstract_bg.alt: Abstract dynamic neon blue and pink light reflections

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere strictly to the '7 Dark-First Utility DARK' personality. Do not use heavy shadows; rely on dividers (1px border) and tonal contrast (surface vs surfaceSecondary).

The user explicitly requested 'neon blue #00D9FF' and 'neon green #00FF88' accents. This is legally permitted per the prompt's exception rule because the user literally typed the colors and it fits the Web3/Crypto domain.

Implement the TradingView-inspired 'Thumb-Zone Architecture': Pin critical actions like the 'Analyze Setup' button at the bottom of the screen above the safe area, avoiding the need for users to reach up.
Use 'Rajdhani' for all display numbers, metrics, prices, and high-impact headings to reinforce the technical command-center feel. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text and labels.
Apply 'gradient-to-dark scrims' if rendering any text on top of the provided background images, enforcing >=70% opacity at the bottom stop.

For the AI Analysis Report Card, if confidence is < 85%, forcefully display 'WAIT - No A+ setup found' in warning color (#FFB800) instead of rendering trade parameters. Do not recommend trades below an A grade.
Ensure 'Rounded cards' are implemented using the 'md' (12px) or 'lg' (16px) radius tokens, overriding the typical sharp brutalist edges of pure utility apps, as requested by the user.
